title: Stupendous Weapons
description:
a mod that adds silly weapons and mobs that are STUPENDOUS!

[this project has since been deprecated, we might remaster one day]
body:
# STUPENDOUS WEAPONS

**A stupid mod that adds a bunch of stupid weapons**.
## ABOUT:

This mod adds currently (**1**) custom biome(s). In future updates more biomes will come, as well as occasional overhauls that further expand on the early iterations. 

Every weapon has a unique side effect or ability. 
For example, the **Crabsurgalith** allows you to charge up an attack, making you more vulnerable the longer you charge, but rewarding you with tons of damage on your next swing. It also has a passive ability, granting you speed if you're wearing no armor. 

This mod also adds a **custom crit system**, which just rewards you for combo-ing crits, giving you extra experience points on kill.

**_There isn't a config just yet. But we plan on adding one._**

### CURRENTLY IN PRE-PRE-PRE-PRE-PRE(x99) ALPHA 
so dont expect anything huge just yet, we plan on overhauling everything in a future update, with better code and management

![Image of the custom Tarlands Biome with some of the featured mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2304840c06eb2ab1398d6260c90f41dcdfcbcc6a.png)

## 🛠️ REQUIREMENTS:

- [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) is required for the mods animations to function correctly.
  
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) although not strictly required, its **highly recommened** as the mod was designed with it in mind.


we are currently working on bug fixing and overhauling!!
